title: Sway Away
description: Adds an additional View Bobbing option with view model only bobbing.
body:
Sway Away adds an additional View Bobbing option with view model only bobbing, letting you have a first person walk animation without camera movement.

The View Bobbing option in Embeddium will also be swapped out if it's installed.

This is a client-side mod. It won't do anything if installed on a server.
